creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Hi,

A newer version (2.1.17) is out.
The updated patch is attached.
Thanks.

- Sunpoet

--- udunits-2.1.17.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/science/udunits/Makefile /usr/ports/sunpoet/udunits/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/science/udunits/Makefile	2010-03-09 16:24:43.000000000 +0800
+++ /usr/ports/sunpoet/udunits/Makefile	2010-06-25 11:23:23.000000000 +0800
@@ -6,11 +6,12 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	udunits
-PORTVERSION=	2.1.14
+PORTVERSION=	2.1.17
 CATEGORIES=	science math
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.unidata.ucar.edu/pub/udunits/
+MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.unidata.ucar.edu/pub/udunits/ \
+		http://sunpoet.net/distfiles/
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	sunpoet@sunpoet.net
 COMMENT=	A library for manipulating units of physical quantities
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	expat.6:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/expat2
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/science/udunits/distinfo /usr/ports/sunpoet/udunits/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/science/udunits/distinfo	2010-03-09 16:24:43.000000000 +0800
+++ /usr/ports/sunpoet/udunits/distinfo	2010-06-25 11:24:23.000000000 +0800
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (udunits-2.1.14.tar.gz) = 17698289a0d6b04551fe6d6a389af41c
-SHA256 (udunits-2.1.14.tar.gz) = 6065001cf91d716d33b4aa81b7cd2354a2a751988fad6970b7874413ddf2c02b
-SIZE (udunits-2.1.14.tar.gz) = 1053762
+MD5 (udunits-2.1.17.tar.gz) = cc7d011987b0473c352119a1bcbfb0ea
+SHA256 (udunits-2.1.17.tar.gz) = b12eee7748c9668c905f9a7be44da60be082982a059d8bea877ac458a211bbbd
+SIZE (udunits-2.1.17.tar.gz) = 1056592
--- udunits-2.1.17.patch ends here ---
